name: AEGIS WF14 — Public Safety Incident Monitor

parameters.bodyParametersJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ incidentType: 'public_safety_incident', severity: $json.severity, probability: $json.probability, message: $json.message, source: 'n8n_public_safety_monitor', metadata: { reportCount: $json.reportCount, injuries: $json.injuryReports, recentReports: $json.recentReports } }) }}
